CustomField.description: Lifecycle status of AI triage processing for this comment. Set by NEPA_Comment_AI_Router flow on insert. Null = not yet evaluated; Queued = scheduled for async AI triage; EJ-Routed = EJ/tribal gate triggered and routed to specialist; Classified = AI triage complete; Human-Review = routed for human review.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI triage status: Null = pending, Queued = awaiting AI, EJ-Routed = EJ/tribal specialist queue, Classified = AI complete, Human-Review = escalated.
CustomField.label: AI Triage Status
